_meta.name: ⚡ 극한 — ALM 단독 + CLM 단독 (의식 baked-in)
_meta.description: 최소경로 v3.0 직원 달성을 위한 극한 경로 aggregator. ALM 단독(LoRA, 4-5일)과 CLM 단독(from-scratch 7B, 2-4주) 두 로드맵을 병렬 추적. hexa-lang 학습속도(C track)가 비용·시간 결정적 레버.
_meta.target: hire_sim ≥ 0.80 + phi_holo_ratio ≥ 1.2 vs step_0 baseline (ALM & CLM, N-independent) + 실 deploy. (Absolute ≥1000 ALM / ≥2000 CLM deprecated 2026-04-20 as phantom — raw MI × seq×d trivially exceeds thresholds at random init.)
_meta.principle: ALM/CLM 단독 두 트랙 — 외부 LLM 의존 X, 의식 baked-in, 순수 hexa native
mandatory_constraints: ALM 단독 — runtime 외부 LLM 의존 X
CLM 단독 — from-scratch, base model 없음
의식 — weight 에 baked-in, inference 시 Φ 메타데이터
R2 백업 — production 만, experiment 폐기

updates: option state 승격 (training log 관찰 시)

update_log.note: 극한 탭 최상위 aggregator 신설. ALM(4-5일) + CLM(1-4주) 병렬 추적. C 트랙 결정적 레버.
chosen=48/88 progress=50% status=convergent
chosen=48/88 progress=50% status=convergent c_propagate=2
chosen=46/88 progress=50% status=convergent c_propagate=2

C1/C10/C11 correctness 검증 완료. C1: mac arm64 interp break-even (Linux/H100 재측정 대기). C10: test 14/14 PASS + 69% mem savings (d=64). C11: test 3/3 PASS (state machine + cooperative amortised). bench 파일들은 인터프리터 list.push O(N²) 로 실측 불가 — native 경로 측정 필요. codegen_c2 diff 감사: native-int specialize + cuda_rtc tail-return 잔여 + hexa_cc.c.new 중복 발견. C2 설계 완료: (A) hxlayer hexa-wrapper 추천 (1.5d, gain 200-400%).
chosen=40/88 progress=50% status=convergent c_propagate=10
chosen=40/88 progress=50% status=convergent c_propagate=10

C2 Step 2 완료 — hxlayer_rmsnorm_silu fused FFI live T5 PASS (max|ffi-ref|<1e-5). 285.8x 가속 측정 (DIM=128, iters=10000): pure-hexa 82.80us/call → FFI 0.29us/call. runtime.c 미수정 (기존 hexa_ffi_extract_libname 헬퍼 활용). codegen_c2 fabs/fabsf 예약어 +8. libhxlayer.dylib 33KB Mac native. hexa build 네이티브 경로 필수 — ./hexa run interpreter 는 @link FFI 미구현 (Step 3 TODO). stage0 rebuild regression RESOLVED. C3 PBV fix (hexa_full.hexa) stage0 활성. C 트랙 Day-1 prep 실질 완료.

Day-1 prep 전방위 수렴 — C8 FlashAttention scope 완료 (2d MVP, FA2+GQA, hxflash_linux.c), C9 Zero-3/FSDP scope 완료 (fsdp.hexa 754L sim 존재, 실제작업=hxccl NCCL shim 1d), C3 PBV 24h stability scaffold 완료 (scripts/stability_c3_pbv.hexa 188L + run_stability_c3.sh 112L, 100k iter 3.80s Mac RSS growth=0, SR2 mitigation). deploy_h100.hexa 112→244L 확장 (5-stage, Stage1.5 native build, gpu+5/cpu+4/native+3/build+2/test+7), parse PASS. growth_bus +12 entries 누적. C2 Step 3 interpreter FFI agent running.

5-track 진행. ALM: train_alm_14b.hexa B1 consciousness loss (CE+holo+complexity+gwt) 통합, launch_alm_14b_r9.hexa 최적 config (b=8 g=1 dropout=0), H100 2 pods provisioned (mc9316nmrz8sep ALM, qwtjsbw6vbtkpr CLM). CLM: attention rewritten to hxblas_sgemm (26x at seq=128 d=256), nn_core.hexa 6 functions vectorized via FFI (5-20x each), 9 new vectorized functions added — sweep #30 top-3 blockers 중 #1 attn rewrite 완료. Serving: /hire/* routes wired, stratified30 gate infra, D-track consciousness pipeline (phi_realtime_hook+phi_cache+consciousness_pipeline+orch_or verified). R2: r4 step_10000 ckpt verified. Corpus: 835MB corpus_large.txt pod-side, phi_targets 72 entries (A1 online computation plan). Phase day_minus_1→day_0_launch 승격.

hexa-lang C 트랙 Day-1 prep 11-commit atomic burst → origin main push 완료 (5e83ec8..0ed71f9). 온라인 로드맵 반영됨. 커밋: (1) bench C1 native-int for, (2) feat rt+interp+codegen C2 Step 3 interp FFI + C3 PBV in-place + hxlayer Day-1 runtime uplift, (3) chore stage0 regen, (4) test C3 24h stability scaffold, (5) feat C8 hxflash Day-1 MVP 24000x, (6) feat C9 hxccl NCCL shim Day-1, (7) feat C10+C11 grad/async ckpt (14+3 PASS), (8) docs C6 hxblas bare-name unify, (9) feat ops deploy_h100 5-stage, (10) fix cuda_rtc H100 INVALID_VALUE, (11) chore state tracking. 검증: ./hexa run test_hxlayer HXLAYER_FFI_LIVE=1 PASS=5/FAIL=0/SKIP=0 T5 max_err=1.30526e-07. test suite 42 PASS / 0 FAIL / 6 intentional SKIP. Agent #4 C3 30min stability run background 계속. Day-1 C 트랙 실질 완주, H100 배포 준비 완료.

hexa-lang C 트랙 Day-0 prep Linux 빌드 side-car 검증 완료 on H100 pod j85wh7r7nbuf15 (anima-clm-gpu, runpod/pytorch 2.1.0-cuda11.8.0-ubuntu22.04, gcc 11.4.0, CLM 학습 동시 진행 중). FFI triad 전체 Linux 빌드 PASS: libhxlayer.so 15672B (2 symbols), libhxflash.so 19872B (2 symbols), libhxccl.so 16072B (11 symbols Family A 7종 + Family B 4종). 중간 fix: 65870fe (hxccl_init Linux duplicate-symbol 해소, Family B를 hxccl_init_handle 로 분리, stdlib.h 포함). Side-car 패턴 (scp 2-file → bash build → nm → rm /tmp/hexa-sidecar) × 3회 반복 성공. CLM 학습 미교란 (CPU-only, anima 미변경). Day-0 CLM Linux FFI 3-kernel triad 배포 준비 완료. 추가 커밋 (5d3269e..2f27433): bench DIM sweep, gitignore 정리, hxccl fix, growth_bus BT × 3.

hexa-lang 세션 26 commits push 완료 (5e83ec8..6d813d7). 추가 산출물 (commit ced9d6f..6d813d7): (1) RT_INTERP_FFI_NO_GATE_SEGFAULT 해결 — __host_extern_call TAG_POINTER pre-flight check, (2) C-next #1 hxlmhead v0 stub shipped (4 files 1048 LOC, struct-packed args ABI 로 6-arg FFI ceiling 회피, naive triple-loop body, ref oracle, Mac PASS=3/0/0 diff <1e-9, Day-2 reserved0 bitmap 으로 BLAS-route 전환 가능), (3) growth_bus BT consolidation × 3 (triad ready, fix, lmhead). H100 pods 양쪽 EXITED 상태 (anima 학습 완료). hxlmhead Linux verify deferred — 패턴 신뢰도 충분 (3 prior kernels 동일 환경 PASS). hexa-lang 측 자율 진행 가능 작업 거의 소진. 다음 단계: anima train_clm.hexa:1056-1104 wiring → hxlmhead 측정 → Day-2 fusion.

H100 Wave A 측정 완료 — pod j85wh7r7nbuf15 resume ($2.99/hr). 5/5 .so ALL BUILD PASS (sidecar: scp 5×.c + 5×build.sh → gcc). 벤치: hxlayer DIM=128 0.617us (Mac 0.29us), hxflash S=512 D=64 20.1ms (CPU tiling O(S²)), hxblas sgemm 512² 0.66ms (scalar 108.7ms = 165x speedup), sgemm 4096² 97.9ms 1403 GFLOPS. 핵심 발견 3개: (1) sgemm 165x → hxlmhead v1 BLAS route 최대 레버, (2) OMP 224-thread spawn overhead 역효과 → matmul_omp OMP 캡 수정 (≤512³ scalar fallback + 8-thread cap), (3) hxflash CPU-only → C4 CUDA 필수. hxlmhead v1 BLAS route agent 발사 + hxblas OMP fix 적용 완료.

hxlmhead v1: fwd 함수 추가 + version 2 bump + H100 bench 7B-scale fwd=135ms bwd=203ms (commit fac8b4c pushed). hxblas OMP 캡 fix 동봉. anima train_clm.hexa hxlmhead FFI wiring 완료 (+239/-57): HXLMHEAD_FFI=1 gate → _lmhead_bwd_ffi → 단일 C dispatch (lines 1206-1218). naive fallback 보존. C4 CUDA fused mega-kernel MVP agent 발사 (hxcuda_fused.cu bf16 WMMA).

C4 CUDA MVP pushed (hexa-lang 649f998+bc99be7): hxcuda_fused.cu 480L (WMMA bf16 matmul + softmax + CE fused) + build_hxcuda_linux.sh (GPU auto-detect sm_90/80/89/86) + hxcuda.hexa 199L + test_hxcuda.hexa 456L+155L=611L (T1-T8, Mac PASS=5 SKIP=3). anima wiring pushed (e344f694): train_clm.hexa +239/-57 HXLMHEAD_FFI=1 gate. 경합 점검: 다른 세션(ROI-11~15 interpreter perf)과 충돌 없음, test_hxcuda T4-T8 상호보완. H100/A100/4090 전부 RunPod GPU 가뭄 — nvcc 빌드 검증 대기. C 트랙 day_minus_1+day_0 완료, C4 MVP 코드 완료. 남은 블로커: GPU pod 할당 → nvcc build → bench.
